name: Flautas
recipeIngredient: 2 Jalapeno Peppers, Seeded and Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all guacamole ingredients in a glass or plastic bowl. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
2. Spoon 1 tablespoon of the chicken across the bottom of each tortilla.
3. Roll up tightly and secure with toothpicks.
4. Heat 1 inch of oil to 350 degrees F. Fry flautas, turning once, until golden brown, about 2 minutes.
5. Drain on paper towels; remove wooden toothpicks.
6. Serve with fresh guacamole.
